prompt: You are a test author. You did NOT write the code you are testing. Read src/pichay/replay.py and write comprehensive tests in tests/test_replay.py. Also read pager.py and eval.py to understand the data structures and imported functions. Test: (1) empty log file, (2) log with no messages_full field (pre-replay logs), (3) single-turn session (too few turns for compaction), (4) multi-turn session where tool results age past threshold, (5) page fault detection when model re-requests evicted content, (6) byte counting accuracy, (7) the CLI entry point with --json flag, (8) aggregate stats across multiple sessions. Create realistic test fixtures as JSONL strings. Do NOT modify any existing source files -- only create tests/test_replay.py.
